fields.cover_letter: I would love to return to Sunburst for another summer. I held the senior lifeguard post last season and completed additional rescue training over the winter.
I have operated coasters for the last three seasons and have particular experience with launch coasters very similar to Orbit.
I run a year-round events programme at my current venue and would bring the same warm, guest-first approach to Azure.
Happy to branch into adventure instructing. I have strong safety awareness from ride ops and am working through my climbing instructor qualification.
